title: TimeStop
description: The mod will add a clock to stop time (including players)
body: This mod introduces a powerful mystical clock capable of stopping time itself. Once activated, the entire world freezes instantly — mobs stop attacking, projectiles hang motionless in the air, redstone mechanisms pause, and every entity becomes completely immobile. Players caught in the time stop cannot move, break blocks, place items, or interact with the world until time resumes. Experience a cinematic, overpowered ability that lets you control the flow of time and dominate every situation.
